Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E14

programme.title: 1998. A tia Flo está de visita e dá um presente para Stan: um peixe medonho. Com o tempo, começam a aparecer alguns cadáveres por aí, e a mãe de Stan tenta fingir que não tem nada a ver. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E15

programme.title: 1998. Stan foge de casa e vai à Nebraska. Os rapazes querem ver o senhor Hanckey na noite de Natal. E o tio de Cartman e Charles Manson escapam da prisão e se escondem no porão dos Cartman. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E16

programme.title: 1998. Os rapazes são obrigados a escreverem textos sobre pequenas empresas para que o senhor Garrison não perca o seu trabalho como professor. Os meninos se juntam com Tweek, que sugere um novo tema para a redação: "Gnomos que roubam cuecas". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E17

programme.title: 1998. Stan e kyle descobrem um homem que estava preso no gelo há mais de três anos, mas acabam brigando para ver quem o descobriu e qusl nome dar para ele. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E18

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. Randy é o principal responsável para descobrir uma solução para este problema. Enquanto isso, Kyle tenta "conseguir uma ereção". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Chef tem uma namorada nova e ao que parece, é uma relação séria. Agora os rapazes estão preocupados com isso. Enquanto isso, Cartman está com problemas nos olhos e odeia ter que ir ao seu oculista, que o chama de "porquinho". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E03

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. Cartman descobre uma criatura em extinção durante um acampamento. No início, todos acham legal, mas em seguida, todos se dão conta que na verdade esta criatura, é na verdade, um animal pré-histórico extremamente chato. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E05

programme.title: 1999. A aula do senhor Garrison recebe uma visita: Petey, o panda do abuso sexual, que ensina tudo aos rapazes sobre o tema. Em seguida, Cartman decide processar Stan por chamá-lo de "chupa cu", e contrata o pai do Kyle para ser seu advogado. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E06

programme.title: 1999. A senhora Cartman vai para uma festa e deixa o seu filho sob os cuidados de Shelley. Agora, Cartman está preso em sua casa e precisa lidar com os abusos de Shelley, seu namorado de 22 anos e sua gata que está no cio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E34

programme.title: 2008. Light dá a Kiyomi a ordem para matar Near. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E35

programme.title: 2008. De acordo com o acerto, Near e o SPK se encontram com Light e o corpo especial em um armazém. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E36

programme.title: 2008. Embora Mikami tenha escrito os nomes de todos no Death Note, estavam vivos. Near consegue o Death Note e tudo é revelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E37

programme.title: 2007. O brilhante, mas entediado estudante da escola Light Yagami encontra-se mantendo o poder da vida e da morte em suas mãos, o Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E01

programme.title: 2007. Enquanto os criminosos do mundo continuam a morrer, L atende representantes de várias nações. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E02

programme.title: 2007. Ryuk o Shinigami que deixou cair o Death Note no mundo humano, avisa a Light que alguém está no seu encalço. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E03

programme.title: 2007. Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.title: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.title: 2007. Light usa o Death Note para tentar se livrar de uma mulher que poderia ter levado para a prisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.title: 2007. L coloca microfones e câmeras nas casas dos membros do grupo especial, incluindo a casa de Yagami, mas Light dá um passo a frente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E08

programme.title: 2007. Os assassinatos continuam, e L começa a suspeitar do comportamento perfeito de Light que então decide investigar por conta própria. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.title: 2007. As suspeitas de L estão cada vez maior, e Light o convence a convidá-lo para a investigação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E10

programme.title: 2007. Como previsto nas fitas enviadas a TV Sakura, apresentadores e comentaristas de notícias expressaram suas dúvidas sobre a morte de Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E11

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E12

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E13

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E14

programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E25

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha visita Totosai com a Tessaiga quebrada. Sua própria presa é usada para consertá-la. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Inimigo Mortal de Meu Pai: Ryukusei
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E26

programme.title: 2001. Ryukotsusei tira a Tessaiga de Inuyasha e ele se transforma em um youkai. Totosai diz a todos para recuar porque estão em perigo, mas Agome decide ficar para trás. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Onda Explosiva! O Ataque Supremo da Tessaiga
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E27

programme.title: 2001. Em uma certa aldeia, Shippo conhece uma garota chamada Satsuki. Satsuki acredita que seu irmão, que foi à guerra, voltará. Ela mostra a Shippo o tesouro que seu irmão lhe deu, um fragmento de Jóia. Infelizmente, é apenas uma flor feita de pedra. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Flor de Pedra e o Primeiro Amor de Shippo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E01

programme.title: 2002. Os maridos estão sendo atraídos para longe de sua aldeia por uma bela youkai. Suas esposas pedem a Mirok para derrotá-la. Preocupado com ele, Sango o acompanha. Mas Sango é separada dele por uma névoa estranha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Tentação da Linda Mulher na Névoa
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E02

programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Got Served
programme.desc: Bernie is sued for being a negligent parent after a birthday bash for Bryana results in broken bones.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Music Mac
programme.desc: When Vanessa surprises everyone with her musical talent, Isaac Hayes offers Bernie advice on how to nurture it.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Girlhood 101
programme.desc: Celebrate all aspects of girlhood from school to friendships.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - North Carolina AAndT State University
programme.desc: The NCAT HBCU marching band, also known as the Blue and Gold Marching Machine, provides an inside look into how they prepare on their journey to the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Tennessee State University
programme.desc: The TSU HBCU marching band shares pivotal components of their secrets to success from the eyes of the band members and their leaders; they prepare for the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - South Carolina State University
programme.desc: The SC State HBCU marching band, Marching 101, share their success story from a small town; they share their intimate journey to the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Norfolk State University
programme.desc: The NSU HBCU marching band, also known as The Spartan Legion Marching Band, gives a history lesson on how it all began and the untold story of their road to success, from rehearsals to the main stage at the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: Between Sisters
programme.desc: A bride and her sister set out to find their newly discovered siblings in order to invite them to the wedding.

programme.title: If You Really Love Me
programme.desc: The deceased mother of three women returns to Earth as an angel to help them rediscover what is truly important in life.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Tee for Too Many
programme.desc: Jay decides to watch Michael play golf in order to spend more quality time with him; Jr. asks Franklin to help him with his college essay.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Claire and Tony announce the time has come for them to consummate their relationship; Kady catches Jr. playing with her dolls.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Not So Hostile Takeover

programme.title: The Final Say (2023)
programme.desc: A married couple decides to go their separate ways after dealing with the aftermath of infertility and loss. But, they quickly learn that a higher power has the final say, even after the final decree has been given.

programme.title: Sisters (2023)
programme.desc: After losing their mothers at a young age, Diamond and her closest cousins, Tia and Tara, are willing to do anything to keep their grandmother from dying of cancer and save their family.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care (2003)
programme.desc: After getting fired, Charlie and Phil start a daycare facility to make ends meet. Once their business picks up, the established daycare center in town plans to bring them down.

programme.title: Rudy (1993)
programme.desc: With heart and determination an Illinois youth (Sean Astin) tackles shortcomings to play Notre Dame football.

programme.title: Finding Neverland (2004)
programme.desc: Writer J.M. Barrie (Johnny Depp) befriends a widow (Kate Winslet) and her four sons who inspire him to create the character Peter Pan.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Unprotected Sets
programme.desc: Scout Durwood knows what it's like to be the outsider and has created a place for herself onstage with an act unlike any other; she seamlessly blends original songs, absurd dance and provocative stand-up comedy into a hilarious performance.

programme.title: Henry V (1989)
programme.desc: Shakespeare's king of England (Kenneth Branagh) attacks France and declares his love for the French king's daughter.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby (1974)
programme.desc: A shady millionaire (Robert Redford) pines for another man's wife (Mia Farrow) amid the lavish parties and opulent mansions of 1920s Long Island.

programme.title: Something Wild (1986)
programme.desc: A wild woman (Melanie Griffith) takes a yuppie (Jeff Daniels) to her high-school reunion, attended by her ex-convict husband (Ray Liotta).

programme.title: Cyborg (1989)
programme.desc: A martial artist (Jean-Claude Van Damme) hunts a killer (Vincent Klyn) in a plague-infested urban dump of the future.

programme.title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: Daredevil operative Xander Cage (Vin Diesel) springs into action when four dangerous criminals steal Pandora's Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world.

programme.title: Event Horizon (1997)
programme.desc: A spaceship missing for seven years finally re-emerges and sends out a distress signal. But when a team is sent out to investigate, they discover that something sinister has taken over the craft.

programme.title: Paycheck (2003)
programme.desc: After learning that his memory has been erased, a technical wizard (Ben Affleck) goes on the run to piece together clues from his past.

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: Left behind by his crew, a stranded astronaut must find a way to survive on Mars, while NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1999)
programme.desc: A billionaire (Pierce Brosnan) looking for new challenges attracts the attention of an investigator (Rene Russo) when a priceless Monet is stolen.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: The mastermind (Steve McQueen) of a Boston bank caper falls in love with the insurance sleuth (Faye Dunaway) on his trail.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shot's wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: Showgirls (1995)
programme.desc: A dancer (Elizabeth Berkley) becomes understudy in a Las Vegas show, sleeps with the boss (Kyle MacLachlan) and pushes the star (Gina Gershon) down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dynamite (1971)
programme.desc: A thief and a dynamite-tossing Irish revolutionary inadvertently become embroiled in the Mexican Revolution.
Orwell's Big Brother is watching as Winston Smith (John Hurt) and his lover (Suzanna Hamilton) defy authority in bleak Oceania.

programme.title: Into the Blue (2005)
programme.desc: Sam, Jared, Bryce and Amanda go on a treasure-hunting trip, where they discover a downed airplane full of cocaine alongside a famous shipwreck. Unknown to Sam and Jared, Bryce makes a fatal mistake and decides to sell the cocaine.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: The mastermind (Steve McQueen) of a Boston bank caper falls in love with the insurance sleuth (Faye Dunaway) on his trail.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shot's wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: The Untouchables (1987)

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (1979)

programme.title: The Deep House (2021)
